sections.sectionTitle: Topa in Amah a Muangte Kem: Migilote Sia ding

verses.text: Migilote' hangin kilungsosak kei in la, a manloin a gamta mite en' dingin ngaihsun kei in
Bang hang hiam cih leh lopa bangin amaute vulpak ding uh a, lokung hingte bangin keutum ding uh hi
Topa muang in la, gamtat hoih in. Gam nuamah teng in la, thumanin om in
Topa sungah lungkim in; amah in na deihna hong pia ding hi
Topa tungah na vai teng ap in. Amah muang in; amah in hong sem ding hi
Amah in nangma dikna khuavak bangin, nangma thumanna nitaang bangin hong langsak ding hi
Topa' mai-ah khawl dide in la, lungduai takin ngak in. A hihna a daupaipa tung leh siatna a bawlpa tungah kilungso tawmsak ke'n
Hehna panin kikham in la, sinsona nusia in. Nangmah kilungso tawmsak ke'n; tua in siatna bekah a hong paipih hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh migilote kipuaseh ding a, ahih hangin Topa a ngakte in leitung luah ding uh hi
Ahih hangin tawlkhat sungin migilopa om nawnlo ding a, ama omna mun na lim zon' mahmah hangin tua lai-ah amah na omlo ding hi
Ahih hangin lungnemte in leitung luahin, genzawh lohin amaute nuamsa ding uh hi
Migilo in thumanpa sawm a, a ha a gawisan hi
Ahih hangin Topa in migilopa' hun a tungta ahihlam mu ahih manin amah a nuihsan lel hi
Mizawngte leh mi cimawhte a suniam ding, a thutangte a that dingin migilote in namsau dokin, a thal uh a keek hi
A namsau uh amau' lungtang mahah tumin, a thalte uh kitan ding hi
Migilote' hauhna sangin thuman mite in tawmno khat bek a neihna hoihzaw lai hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh migilote' thahatna kipaih khiatsak ding a, ahih hangin Topa in mihoihte a huh hi
Topa in a paubaang lote kem a, amau' gamh kipden ding hi
Siatna hun ciangin amaute kimaizumsak lo a, kial hun ciangin tampi nei uh hi
Ahih hangin migilote kisia hi. Topa' galte pen lono etlawm tawh kibang a, amaute mangthang pak uh hi. Meikhu bangin mangthang uh hi
Migilo in leitawi la a, lohkikzo nawnlo hi. Thuman mi ahih leh cingh-in mi a pia hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' thupha piakte in leitung luah ding uh a, ahih hangin a samsiatte kipuaseh ding hi
Topa in mi a lam paina ding lak a, ama lungkim bangin a gamtapa amah in a kipsak hi
Amah a puk hangin lutuklo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama khut len hi
Thuman mi a kinusiacip, a suanlekhakte ngen tawmin a kivak, ka neu lai-a kipanin tu-a ka teek hun ciangdong ka mu ngei nai kei hi
Amah in mi citpiak ngitngetin, mi tungah leitawi piakhia a, a suanlekhakte zong thupha ngah mi a suak hi
Siatna panin kikem in la, gamtat hoih in; tua hi leh na khan'tawnin, na kip paisuak ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in thutang deih a, ama mi siangthote nusialo ding hi. Thuman mite kikemcing den ding a, ahi zongin migilo' suanlekhakte kipuaseh ding hi
Thuman mi in leitung luah ding a, tua leitang tungah teng paisuak ding hi
Thuman mi' kam in pilna gen a, a leii in thutang gen hi
A lungsim sungah ama Pasian' thukham om a, a gamtatna khempeuhah lampial hetlo hi
Migilo in thuman mi encik a, thah dingin a zong hi
Topa in migilopa' khutsungah amah nusialo ding a, thusit dingin a kipaipih ciangin mawhna thuaksaklo ding hi
Topa ngak in la, ama lampi zui in. Leitang a luah dingin nang hong liansak ding a, migilote' siatna nangmah in na en ding hi
Lebanon taamtak sing bangin a sang pha mahmah migilo kiphasak khat keimah in ka mu hi
Ama kiangah ka paikik a, amah na om nawnlo hi. Amah ka zonzon hangin kimuzo nawnlo hi
Paubaanglo mi ciamteh in la, thutang mi en in; bang hang hiam cih leh gal a phuanglo mi-a' dingin nopna a om hi
Ahih hangin thupalsatte kisusiamang khin ding a, migilote' suanlekhakte kipuaseh ding hi
Topa in thuman mite honkhia a, amah pen haksat hun ciangin amaute' bukna ahi hi
Amaute in Topa beel ahih manin amah in amaute huhin honkhia a,migilote' kiang panin amaute honin suaktasak hi.
